title: Auto time-to-live for automatic row deletion is generally available ​
body:
**June 12, 2026**

Auto time-to-live (auto-TTL) is now generally available. Auto-TTL automatically deletes rows from Unity Catalog managed Delta Lake tables, managed Apache Iceberg tables, and streaming tables based on a `DATE` or `TIMESTAMP` column. See [Automatic row deletion with auto time-to-live](/aws/en/tables/operations/auto-ttl).

ref_links.text: Automatic row deletion with auto time-to-live
